title: Amauropelta christensenii
taxonomy: Amauropelta christensenii belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a species of fern in the genus Amauropelta. This plant is native to South America. Amauropelta christensenii is often classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. Its classification also includes the division Pteridophyta.
